  • Flick an object that you hold with weight no greater than 1 towards a target up to 30 feet away. The object flies unerringly in a straight line towards that target at a moderate speed. Any creature along the object's path can react to catch it as long as they have a free hand with which to do so.

  • Suspend in midair an object or willing creature that you touch with weight less than or equal to 10 times your Presence, altering its position up to 20 feet in any direction from its original location. You can maintain this suspension indefinitely as long as you take no further Action and are not @Condition[incapacitated].

Propel may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch unless otherwise specified. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Gesture: Aspect.name: Gesture: Aspect
Gesture: Aspect.description:
You infuse the essence of a Rune into your body, empowering your own physical form or psyche.

When you assume a certain Aspect, you become more closely attuned to the damage type of the Rune used in your spell. You gain +2 Resistance to that damage type, and deal an additional +2 Damage whenever dealing damage of that type.

Your Aspect lasts for 6 Rounds. You may only have one active Aspect, casting another spell using the Aspect gesture replaces the previous effect. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 2 Action and 1 Focus.

Gesture: Fan.name: Gesture: Fan
Gesture: Fan.description:
You shape the essence of a Rune into a sweeping or splintered arc to strike multiple targets in close proximity.

The Fan gesture scales using Intellect and targets a 120 degree arc with 6 foot radius. It deals 6 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

description.public: Small, swift, and deadly, the dagger slips between ribs or into gaps in armor with ease, its wicked edge favored by assassins, thieves, and those who prefer a silent kill.
Consisting of quilted layers of cloth stuffed with rags or wool, padded armor cushions the body against blunt force and serves as the foundation beneath heavier gear.
Dried bread, nuts, smoked cheese and meat suitable to serve as a rudimentary meal capable of sustaining life for a single day.

Layered oil-soaked affixed around the end of a rod made of bone or another non-flammable material, an inexpensive, if inefficient, temporary lightsource. Each torch can burned for one hour before it can no longer be used.

Light Torch.name: Light Torch
Light Torch.description: You ignite the @ref[name], producing flickering illumination in a wide radius for one hour. The torch is consumed by this action and cannot be used again, but its light remains until it burns out.

description.public: A leather-wrapped bladder that can be affixed to a belt or outside of a pack for convenient use. Can contain 26oz of liquid.

A multifaceted, rough-cut gem imbued with elemental energies. When thrown, this gem shatters and conjures an elemental spirit under the control of the individual that shattered it. Its quality determines the level of elemental summoned.

Summon Flame Elemental.name: Summon Flame Elemental
Summon Flame Elemental.description:
The @ref[name] shatters in a burst of flame, leaving in its place a fiery elemental. Elementals summoned by this gem remain for 6 Rounds (1 minute).

  • Shoddy - No elemental is summoned

  • Standard - Mote

  • Fine - Sprite

  • Superior - Visitor

  • Masterwork - Wanderer

description.public:
This elegant ornamented ring feels slightly slick and difficult to grasp. While held it vibrates almost imperceptibly.

This enchanted ring provides a bonus to Dodge defense.
description.private:
This item is presented as an example of a Fine Ring with the @UUID[Compendium.crucible.affixes.ActiveEffect.evasion000000000]{Evasion} suffix.

This affix can be applied to any armor or accessory and this ring could be further enchanted with a Tier 1 prefix.

Evasion.name: Evasion
Evasion.description: Increase Dodge defense by 1 for each Tier of this suffix.

description.public:
This ring made of an opaque stone that has been carefully carved with graceful, sweeping layers evoking an ancient aesthetic. The ring serves as a powerful spellcasting focus for the Invested wearer.

This enchanted ring grants the ability to withdraw an additional reserve of Focus in moments of duress.
description.private:
This item is presented as an example of a Fine Ring with the @UUID[Compendium.crucible.affixes.ActiveEffect.focusing00000000]{Reserved Focus} prefix.

This affix can be applied to any accessory and this ring could be further enchanted with a Tier 1 suffix.

Focusing.name: Focusing
Focusing.description: Grants the Replenish Focus action, allowing the bearer to restore Focus in moments of duress. The amount restored scales with the Tier of this affix.

affixFocusing.name: Replenish Focus
affixFocusing.description:
In moments of duress you can withdraw an additional reserve of Focus from this item. The amount of Focus restored depends on the Tier of this prefix.

  • Tier 1: 4 Focus

  • Tier 2: 6 Focus

  • Tier 3: 8 Focus

description.public: This potion contains a specialized alchemical formula to rapidly close wounds and improve bodily health.

Healing Elixir.name: Healing Elixir
Healing Elixir.description:
Immediately recover an amount of Health dependant on the quality of the elixir.

  • Shoddy - Immediately heals 6 Health.

  • Standard - Immediately heals 12 Health.

  • Fine - Immediately heals 24 Health.

  • Superior - Immediately heals 48 Health.

  • Masterwork - Immediately heals 96 Health.

ancestry.name: Gnome
ancestry.description: Yours was a birth of exuberant celebration. Your diminutive body and delicate features are paired with an almost supernatural propensity for discovery. The traditions of your people embrace a lust for life and the importance of quick-thinking and quick-action.

background.name: Merchant
background.description: You were a travelling salesperson or tended a small shop. You spent a significant portion of your time learning the art of negotiation with people from all walks of life, and where the boundaries of the best deal lay.

Rune: Soul.name: Rune: Soul
Rune: Soul.description:
An orderly force of creation and spiritual essence. The Soul rune governs the fundamental procession of souls through life and death and relates to matters of sapience, personality, and mental health.

The Soul rune scales using Presence and provides Restoration of Morale. In special circumstances it may be used to inflict Psychic damage opposed by Willpower. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Oblivion.

Evoke.name: Evoke
Evoke.description:
Your command of the Rune of Soul allows you to facilitate basic forms of spiritual influence, producing one of the following effects:

  • Enable yourself or another willing person to revisit a core memory of a moment from their past up to one minute in duration as if it happened recently.

  • Identify a negative spiritual condition that is affecting a person such as @Condition[broken], @Condition[frightened], @Condition[confused], or @Condition[insane].

  • Create a momentary spiritual connection with another willing creature that allows them to recognize an idea which can be expressed as a single word.

Uses of Evoke may only affect yourself or another creature which you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Light Weapon Training.name: Light Weapon Training
Light Weapon Training.description: You know how to wield light weapons fluidly with a high degree of maneuverability and grace in combat. You are Trained with all weapons in the Light and Balanced categories.

Lunge.name: Lunge
Lunge.description:
You dart forward nimbly, making a strike with sudden and unexpected swiftness to perform a Strike with a weapon which scales using Dexterity against a single target, with an increased range of +2 feet.

The attack is Difficult, but you do not move from your current position nor does this attack provoke Disengagement.

Inspire Heroism.name: Inspire Heroism
Inspire Heroism.description: Your courageous presence inspires your nearby allies to strike with confidence.

Inspire Heroism.name: Inspire Heroism
Inspire Heroism.description: Each ally, excluding yourself, within 10 Feet gains +1 Boon to actions performed until the end of their next Turn.

Deception Novice.name: Deception Novice
Deception Novice.description:
You are a liar and manipulator, and deception is a skill you've practiced. You gain the Novice rank in the Deception skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to construct basic lies and cons, and the telltale signs that tend to give away poor liars. You can construct a basic forgery for most common documents, but they won't stand up to any measure of close scrutiny.

Performance Novice.name: Performance Novice
Performance Novice.description:
You have learned the basic practices of art and entertainment. You gain the Novice rank in the Performance skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know a few common dances, have a collection of well-known tales, and you could probably sing or play a few popular songs. You may be trained in an instrument or two, and your capability with a brush or pen is reasonable enough that you could probably create a passable work of art.

Talisman Weapon Training.name: Talisman Weapon Training
Talisman Weapon Training.description: You understand the arcane usage of talismans, orbs, foci, or other similar implements to channel magic or empower spellcraft. You are Trained with weapons in the Talisman categories.

Refocus.name: Refocus
Refocus.description:
You use your equipped Talisman to attempt to regain some Focus. You perform a Harmless Strike against your own Rallying threshold.

On a success you recover +1 Focus if using a one-handed Talisman and +2 Focus if using a two-handed Talisman. On a critical success the amount of Focus recovered increases by an additional +1.

Gesture: Influence.name: Gesture: Influence
Gesture: Influence.description:
You intensify the arcane power of a Rune into a concentrated direct contact which is generally a more powerful evolution of the basic Touch gesture.

The Influence gesture scales using Presence and targets a single adjacent creature. It deals 10 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Clarify Intent.name: Clarify Intent
Clarify Intent.description: You use apply your situational awareness and persuasiveness to rapidly communicate a plan of action to an ally.

Clarify Intent.name: Clarify Intent
Clarify Intent.description: You explain your intentions to an ally within 12 feet. Make an Diplomacy skill attack against your ally's Madness Threshold. If successful they gain +1 Focus and +1 Boon to actions made within the next Round.

description.public: A stringed instrument within a curved frame. The lyre is a favored instrument of many roving bards or storytellers which use music to augment their magic or oration.

ancestry.name: Halfling
ancestry.description: You were raised in a creche surrounded by other halflings. Your lilliputian stature, thick-soled hairy feet, and the swiftness of your mind and body are what your people are most known for. Yours is a people for whom education and tradition are paramount.

background.name: Performer
background.description: You were a travelling entertainer. You learned to be comfortable attending a variety of social functions, how to play to your audience, embellishing details of your performance to evoke particular emotional responses.

Rune: Soul.description:
An orderly force of creation and spiritual essence. The Soul rune governs the fundamental procession of souls through life and death and relates to matters of sapience, personality, and mental health.

Rune: Life.name: Rune: Life
Rune: Life.description:
A chaotic force of creation, responsible for living matter. The Life rune governs health and matters relating to biological growth.

The Life rune scales using Wisdom and provides Restoration of Health. In special circumstances it may be used to inflict Poison damage opposed by Fortitude. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Death.

Bloom.name: Bloom
Bloom.description:
Your command of the Rune of Life allows you to stimulate biological growth and nourish physical health, producing one of the following effects:

  • Cultivate 1 cubic foot of existing plants or fungus to rapidly grow to a healthy, blossoming, or harvestable state.

  • Identify a negative physical condition that is affecting a creature such as @Condition[diseased], @Condition[poisoned], @Condition[bleeding], or @Condition[weakened].

  • Verify whether a portion of food or drink is free of contamination from bacteria, parasites, or poison.

Bloom may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Medicine Novice.name: Medicine Novice
Medicine Novice.description:
You have a basic education in anatomy, physiology, and medicine. You gain the Novice rank in the Medicine skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You’ve learned the basics of treating common wounds and illnesses, and keep a running list of known alchemical and herbal compounds that can be used for treating particular illnesses. With a little time studying an injured, diseased, or otherwise ill individual you can perform a basic diagnosis and treat accordingly.

Science Novice.name: Science Novice
Science Novice.description:
You've learned to study the world around you through structured observation, mathematics, physics, chemistry, and other disciplines. You gain the Novice rank in the Science skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You are familiar with the basic principles of mathematics, physics, chemistry, or other scientific studies. You know how to construct and use simple machines for the purposes of making physical tasks easier. You know some of the more commonly understood scientific theories, and given suitable time to study more complex machines you might be able to at least operate them.

You know how to leverage emotion in your words to inspire others or sway their opinions. You can make a convincing argument, and you can generally steer others to agree with your point of view.

Rune: Control.name: Rune: Control
Rune: Control.description:
The orderly force of discipline and permanence. The Control rune governs thought, reason, and persistence.

The Control rune scales using Wisdom, targets Willpower, and deals Psychic damage to Morale. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Kinesis.

Motivate.name: Motivate
Motivate.description:
Your command of the Rune of Control allows you to affect the decision making of others in basic ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Moderately intensify or dampen the primary emotion being felt by a creature you touch. If the creature is intelligent enough to be aware of the laws governing spellcraft, they are aware of your actions.

  • Understand the abstract motivations of another living creature which allows you to touch it. You are able to intuit their immediate goals expressed in the form of a single verb.

  • Intensely focus on your current objective and the means of achieving it. You receive a brief hint or reminder from the Gamemaster about that objective containing only information which you have previously learned.

Motivate may only affect a creature or object which you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

description.public: This talisman is a visible proclamation of its wielder's faith and the power it bestows upon them. In combat it can be used to project a searing beam of radiant light towards an enemy.
description.private: The type of damage dealt by this talisman can be tailored to the domain of whichever deity its weilder worships.

description.public: Consisting of quilted layers of cloth stuffed with rags or wool, padded armor cushions the body against blunt force and serves as the foundation beneath heavier gear.
Dried bread, nuts, smoked cheese and meat suitable to serve as a rudimentary meal capable of sustaining life for a single day.

Layered oil-soaked affixed around the end of a rod made of bone or another non-flammable material, an inexpensive, if inefficient, temporary lightsource. Each torch can burned for one hour before it can no longer be used.

Light Torch.name: Light Torch
Light Torch.description: You ignite the @ref[name], producing flickering illumination in a wide radius for one hour. The torch is consumed by this action and cannot be used again, but its light remains until it burns out.

description.public: A leather-wrapped bladder that can be affixed to a belt or outside of a pack for convenient use. Can contain 26oz of liquid.
This potion contains a specialized alchemical formula to rapidly close wounds and improve bodily health.

Healing Elixir.name: Healing Elixir
Healing Elixir.description:
Immediately recover an amount of Health dependant on the quality of the elixir.

  • Shoddy - Immediately heals 6 Health.

  • Standard - Immediately heals 12 Health.

  • Fine - Immediately heals 24 Health.

  • Superior - Immediately heals 48 Health.

  • Masterwork - Immediately heals 96 Health.

description.public:
A small, vibrant blue pearl that feels refreshingly cool to the touch regardless of ambient temperature.

This enchanted pearl grants its bearer the Replenish Focus action, providing an additional reserve of Focus that can be drawn upon in moments of duress.
description.private:
This item is presented as an example of a Fine Pearl with the @UUID[Compendium.crucible.affixes.ActiveEffect.focusing00000000]{Focusing} prefix.

This affix can be applied to any accessory and this pearl could be further enchanted with a Tier 1 suffix.

Focusing.name: Focusing
Focusing.description: Grants the Replenish Focus action, allowing the bearer to restore Focus in moments of duress. The amount restored scales with the Tier of this affix.

affixFocusing.name: Replenish Focus
affixFocusing.description:
In moments of duress you can withdraw an additional reserve of Focus from this item. The amount of Focus restored depends on the Tier of this prefix.

  • Tier 1: 4 Focus

  • Tier 2: 6 Focus

  • Tier 3: 8 Focus

description.public:
A graceful silver amulet embedded with blue jewels imbues you with a feeling of steadfastness while you clutch it, prepared to weather any challenge.

This enchanted periapt provides a bonus to Willpower defense.
description.private:
This item is presented as an example of a Fine Periapt with the @UUID[Compendium.crucible.affixes.ActiveEffect.determination000]{Determination} suffix.

This affix can be applied to any armor or accessory and this periapt could be further enchanted with a Tier 1 prefix.

Determination.name: Determination
Determination.description: Increase Willpower defense by 1 for each Tier of this suffix.

ancestry.name: Halfling
ancestry.description: You were raised in a creche surrounded by other halflings. Your lilliputian stature, thick-soled hairy feet, and the swiftness of your mind and body are what your people are most known for. Yours is a people for whom education and tradition are paramount.

background.name: Physician
background.description: You were a healer or medical professional of some variety. You have spent a portion of your life learning medical science, and you have a propensity for noticing illness in others. You know how to treat wounds, diseases, and how to identify their sources.

Healing Elixir.name: Healing Elixir
Healing Elixir.description:
Immediately recover an amount of Health dependant on the quality of the elixir.

  • Shoddy - Immediately heals 6 Health.

  • Standard - Immediately heals 12 Health.

  • Fine - Immediately heals 24 Health.

  • Superior - Immediately heals 48 Health.

  • Masterwork - Immediately heals 96 Health.

Heavy Strike.name: Heavy Strike
Heavy Strike.description: You unleash a powerful Strike with your mainhand weapon. The attack is slower to execute, but is Empowered to deliver additional damage.

Intercept.name: Intercept
Intercept.description: You protect your allies, intercepting blows that might otherwise be directed towards your companions.

Intercept.name: Intercept
Intercept.condition: An enemy moves into or through your Engagement radius.
Intercept.description:
You intercept the path of an enemy which enters your Engagement radius, immediatly moving up to your Stride to interpose yourself and block their path.

If the enemy moves out of your Engagement radius or attacks any other creature during their turn, you may make a Disengagement Strike against them.

Unarmed Combat Training.name: Unarmed Combat Training
Unarmed Combat Training.description: You are familiar with basic martial arts and hand-to-hand combat. You know how to subdue or restrain opponents using your physical Strength. You are Trained with weapons in the Unarmed category.

Grapple.name: Grapple
Grapple.description: You attempt to physically restrain or subdue an opponent. Perform a Athletics skill attack against an adjacent target. If successful, both you and your target are @Condition[restrained] for 1 Round.

Awareness Novice.name: Awareness Novice
Awareness Novice.description:
You have been trained in the basics of situational awareness, and are able to notice important details about your environment. You gain the Novice rank in the Awareness skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know to check for exits when you enter a room, and how to look for concealed weapons, hidden traps, and other threats. You know how to spot when you are being followed, and how to search for common hiding places.

Intimidation Novice.name: Intimidation Novice
Intimidation Novice.description:
You understand the fundamentals of how threats and coercion can achieve desired outcomes. You gain the Novice rank in the Intimidation skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to use simple displays of violence or overt threats to get others to follow your lead, but you aren't very subtle.

Heavy Weapon Training.name: Heavy Weapon Training
Heavy Weapon Training.description: You know how to use a heavy weapon to deliver punishing blows, putting your entire strength behind every swing. You are Trained with all weapons in the Heavy and Balanced categories.

Heavy Strike.name: Heavy Strike
Heavy Strike.description: You unleash a powerful Strike with your mainhand weapon. The attack is slower to execute, but is Empowered to deliver additional damage.

Inspire Heroism.name: Inspire Heroism
Inspire Heroism.description: Your courageous presence inspires your nearby allies to strike with confidence.

Inspire Heroism.name: Inspire Heroism
Inspire Heroism.description: Each ally, excluding yourself, within 10 Feet gains +1 Boon to actions performed until the end of their next Turn.

Ruthless Momentum.name: Ruthless Momentum
Ruthless Momentum.description: You relish the carnage you can cause in combat and continue to press the fray as each enemy falls.

Ruthless Momentum.name: Ruthless Momentum
Ruthless Momentum.condition: You incapacitate an enemy with a melee attack.
Ruthless Momentum.description: After defeating an enemy, you may move up to your Stride and attack another foe within melee range.

description.public: A bastard sword, also known as a hand-and-a-half sword, is a versatile weapon with a straight, double-edged blade around 40 inches long. This weapon is forged for both single-handed agility and two-handed power.
Ring mail features metal rings sewn onto a padded base, offering a compromise of less protection than heavier mail options in exchange for greater mobility.

This steel ring feels permanently cool to the touch and gives the sensation of weighing more than expected given its narrow band.

This enchanted ring provides a bonus to Armor defense.
description.private:
This item is presented as an example of a Fine Ring with the @UUID[Compendium.crucible.affixes.ActiveEffect.reinforcement000]{Reinforcement} suffix.

This affix can be applied to any armor or accessory and this ring could be further enchanted with a Tier 1 prefix.

Reinforcement.name: Reinforcement
Reinforcement.description: Increase Armor defense by 1 for each Tier of this suffix.

A leather-wrapped bladder that can be affixed to a belt or outside of a pack for convenient use. Can contain 26oz of liquid.

ancestry.name: Human
ancestry.description: Found amid countless conditions and far-flung places, you were born an ever-adaptable human. Tall or short, thin, muscular, or rotund, your physical appearance is nothing if not varied. Humans are most known for a genetic predisposition toward determination, with traditions that drive a stubborn will to survive.

background.name: Constable
background.description: You were part of a law enforcement organization. You learned how to remain vigilant to your surroundings, work within complex social structures, and affect an imposing presence.

Intercept.name: Intercept
Intercept.description: You protect your allies, intercepting blows that might otherwise be directed towards your companions.

Intercept.name: Intercept
Intercept.condition: An enemy moves into or through your Engagement radius.
Intercept.description:
You intercept the path of an enemy which enters your Engagement radius, immediatly moving up to your Stride to interpose yourself and block their path.

If the enemy moves out of your Engagement radius or attacks any other creature during their turn, you may make a Disengagement Strike against them.

Light Weapon Training.name: Light Weapon Training
Light Weapon Training.description: You know how to wield light weapons fluidly with a high degree of maneuverability and grace in combat. You are Trained with all weapons in the Light and Balanced categories.

Lunge.name: Lunge
Lunge.description:
You dart forward nimbly, making a strike with sudden and unexpected swiftness to perform a Strike with a weapon which scales using Dexterity against a single target, with an increased range of +2 feet.

The attack is Difficult, but you do not move from your current position nor does this attack provoke Disengagement.

Deception Novice.name: Deception Novice
Deception Novice.description:
You are a liar and manipulator, and deception is a skill you've practiced. You gain the Novice rank in the Deception skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to construct basic lies and cons, and the telltale signs that tend to give away poor liars. You can construct a basic forgery for most common documents, but they won't stand up to any measure of close scrutiny.

Inspire Heroism.name: Inspire Heroism
Inspire Heroism.description: Your courageous presence inspires your nearby allies to strike with confidence.

Inspire Heroism.name: Inspire Heroism
Inspire Heroism.description: Each ally, excluding yourself, within 10 Feet gains +1 Boon to actions performed until the end of their next Turn.

Performance Novice.name: Performance Novice
Performance Novice.description:
You have learned the basic practices of art and entertainment. You gain the Novice rank in the Performance skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know a few common dances, have a collection of well-known tales, and you could probably sing or play a few popular songs. You may be trained in an instrument or two, and your capability with a brush or pen is reasonable enough that you could probably create a passable work of art.

Dual Wield.name: Dual Wield
Dual Wield.description: You are adept at fighting with two weapons simultaneously. You can weave attacks together to strike more rapidly than possible with a single weapon.

Offhand Strike.name: Offhand Strike
Offhand Strike.description: Immediately after you perform a basic Strike with your mainhand weapon, you make a reduced-cost fullow-up Strike with your offhand weapon.

Weak Points.name: Weak Points
Weak Points.description: You identify moments of opportunity to strike at an enemy's weak points. When attacking a target that is @Condition[unaware], @Condition[flanked], or @Condition[exposed] using a weapon which scales with Dexterity, you gain +2 damage to any Strike.

description.public: With its wide, curved blade and deadly arc, the scimitar dances through battle, its edge carving through foes in sweeping, elegant strikes.
A base of leather reinforced with small metal studs or riveted plates, this armor strikes a balance between mobility and modest protection against slashes.

This elegant ornamented ring feels slightly slick and difficult to grasp. While held it vibrates almost imperceptibly.

This enchanted ring provides a bonus to Dodge defense.
description.private:
This item is presented as an example of a Fine Ring with the @UUID[Compendium.crucible.affixes.ActiveEffect.evasion000000000]{Evasion} suffix.

This affix can be applied to any armor or accessory and this ring could be further enchanted with a Tier 1 prefix.

Humans are most known for a genetic predisposition toward determination, with traditions that drive a stubborn will to survive.

background.name: Performer
background.description: You were a travelling entertainer. You learned to be comfortable attending a variety of social functions, how to play to your audience, embellishing details of your performance to evoke particular emotional responses.

Inspire Heroism.name: Inspire Heroism
Inspire Heroism.description: Each ally, excluding yourself, within 10 Feet gains +1 Boon to actions performed until the end of their next Turn.

Intercept.condition: An enemy moves into or through your Engagement radius.
Intercept.description:
You intercept the path of an enemy which enters your Engagement radius, immediatly moving up to your Stride to interpose yourself and block their path.

If the enemy moves out of your Engagement radius or attacks any other creature during their turn, you may make a Disengagement Strike against them.

Leg Sweep.name: Leg Sweep
Leg Sweep.description: You make a Strike attack with your mainhand weapon. This technique is Difficult to execute and deals reduced damage, but if successful renders your target Prone.

Lunge.name: Lunge
Lunge.description:
You dart forward nimbly, making a strike with sudden and unexpected swiftness to perform a Strike with a weapon which scales using Dexterity against a single target, with an increased range of +2 feet.

The attack is Difficult, but you do not move from your current position nor does this attack provoke Disengagement.

Rapid Reload.name: Rapid Reload
Rapid Reload.description: You focus deeply and calm your nerves to quickly Reload your mechanical weapon with exceptional haste.

Projectile Weapon Training.name: Projectile Weapon Training
Projectile Weapon Training.description: You have a basic education in archery and other projectile weaponry. You are no longer treated as Untrained with weapons in the Projectile categories.

Quick Draw.name: Quick Draw
Quick Draw.description: You can loose a shot under pressure, although with decreased accuracy. You perform a Strike that is Difficult, but has a reduced Action cost.

Precision Shot.name: Precision Shot
Precision Shot.description: You take time to steady your aim and target the weakest point of a foe. You may only get one shot, but you make it count.

Precision Shot.name: Precision Shot
Precision Shot.description: You steady your aim and fire a single accurate shot.

Athletics Novice.name: Athletics Novice
Athletics Novice.description:
You have received training in basic athletics. You gain the Novice rank in the Athletics skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know whether a surface can support your weight or not, how to find handholds while climbing, and how to distribute your weight for buoyancy when swimming. You know how to run for distance, and how to pace yourself to avoid exhaustion.

Wilderness Novice.name: Wilderness Novice
Wilderness Novice.description:
You have received training in the basics of wilderness survival and traversal. You gain the Novice rank in the Wilderness skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to find and construct safe shelter from the elements, to start a fire for warmth, to keep cool in hot environments. You can find safe, drinkable water in most places, and how to identify which plants and animals can serve as safe food sources.

Twinned Shot.name: Twinned Shot
Twinned Shot.description: You prepare two shots to fire simultaneously at a single target.

Twinned Shot.name: Twinned Shot
Twinned Shot.description: You concentrate to nock two projectiles at once making two Strike simultaneous attacks against the same single target.

Flaming Arrow.name: Flaming Arrow
Flaming Arrow.description: You take time to light and loose an arrow covered in flammable pitch. This shot takes longer but is very damaging to either creatures or structures.

Flaming Arrow.name: Flaming Arrow
Flaming Arrow.description: You loose a Empowered ranged strike using a Projectile weapon which deals Fire damage upon impact.

Thread the Needle.name: Thread the Needle
Thread the Needle.description: You concentrate to fire a shot into the swirl of melee. This attack benefits from Flanking as if it were a melee attack.

Thread the Needle.name: Thread the Needle
Thread the Needle.description: You fire a precise shot into melee combat, targeting an enemy which is engaged by one of your allies.

description.public: A tall, self-bow often taller than the archer who draws it, the longbow requires great strength and years of practice to master, sending arrows with deadly force across the battlefield.
A heavy, crescent-bladed weapon built for cleaving through armor and bone alike. Its haft is marked from countless blows. This weapon can be gripped either in one hand or two.
Crafted from thick, boiled leather hardened into panels or a cuirass, leather armor offers lightweight protection ideal for scouts, rogues, and lightly armed skirmishers.
Dried bread, nuts, smoked cheese and meat suitable to serve as a rudimentary meal capable of sustaining life for a single day.

Heavy Strike.name: Heavy Strike
Heavy Strike.description: You unleash a powerful Strike with your mainhand weapon. The attack is slower to execute, but is Empowered to deliver additional damage.

ancestry.name: Orcish
ancestry.description: Your birth was marked by the stars and traditions of a proud and enduring people. Your tall and well-toned body and natural propensity for toughness has origins amid a people exposed to the relentless struggle of a harsh northern clime. Your people are known for their strength and resilience above all else.

background.name: Wanderer
background.description: Yours has been an itinerant life. You enjoy nothing more than the feeling of a cart or mount below you, watching some foreign sky slowly pass above you. You learned to pay careful attention to your surroundings and their needs, to tend the creatures on which you rely, and to make do with what you can find.

Talisman Weapon Training.name: Talisman Weapon Training
Talisman Weapon Training.description: You understand the arcane usage of talismans, orbs, foci, or other similar implements to channel magic or empower spellcraft. You are Trained with weapons in the Talisman categories.

Refocus.name: Refocus
Refocus.description:
You use your equipped Talisman to attempt to regain some Focus. You perform a Harmless Strike against your own Rallying threshold.

On a success you recover +1 Focus if using a one-handed Talisman and +2 Focus if using a two-handed Talisman. On a critical success the amount of Focus recovered increases by an additional +1.

Medicine Novice.name: Medicine Novice
Medicine Novice.description:
You have a basic education in anatomy, physiology, and medicine. You gain the Novice rank in the Medicine skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You’ve learned the basics of treating common wounds and illnesses, and keep a running list of known alchemical and herbal compounds that can be used for treating particular illnesses. With a little time studying an injured, diseased, or otherwise ill individual you can perform a basic diagnosis and treat accordingly.

Rune: Soul.name: Rune: Soul
Rune: Soul.description:
An orderly force of creation and spiritual essence. The Soul rune governs the fundamental procession of souls through life and death and relates to matters of sapience, personality, and mental health.

The Soul rune scales using Presence and provides Restoration of Morale. In special circumstances it may be used to inflict Psychic damage opposed by Willpower. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Oblivion.

Evoke.name: Evoke
Evoke.description:
Your command of the Rune of Soul allows you to facilitate basic forms of spiritual influence, producing one of the following effects:

  • Enable yourself or another willing person to revisit a core memory of a moment from their past up to one minute in duration as if it happened recently.

  • Identify a negative spiritual condition that is affecting a person such as @Condition[broken], @Condition[frightened], @Condition[confused], or @Condition[insane].

  • Create a momentary spiritual connection with another willing creature that allows them to recognize an idea which can be expressed as a single word.

Uses of Evoke may only affect yourself or another creature which you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Arcana Novice.name: Arcana Novice
Arcana Novice.description:
Your education covered the fundamentals of metaphysics and magical theory, the relationship between the runes, the opposing nature of order and chaos, and a cursory introduction to spiritual beings including the most commonly known deified and demonized figures of worship. You gain the Novice rank in the Arcana skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

Your rudimentary understanding of the principle grammar of magic is sufficient to identify which lesser rune a spell or ritual may be using, as well as the gesture used (if not the inflection). You can identify whether a figure is influenced more by chaos or by order, and can spot the signs of common spirits (both lesser and greater). You know enough about religious customs to communicate with those who worship a particular spirit or deity without embarrassing yourself.

Wildspeaker.name: Wildspeaker
Wildspeaker.description: You have a preternatural knack for communicating with animals. Through body language and sounds, you are capable of interpreting and communicating in the language of the wilderness.

Wildspeak.name: Wildspeak
Wildspeak.description:
If you succeed on a [[/skillCheck wilderness 14]] check, you may pose simple questions to a Beast which can perceive you. As long as the creature is not hostile it will respond accurately within the limits of its own knowledge.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score of zero are incapable of understanding you.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score of 1 can only respond with "yes" or "no" responses.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score greater than 1 can provide simple multi-word responses.

Gesture: Create.name: Gesture: Create
Gesture: Create.description:
You coalesce arcane power into tangible form, manifesting a Sprite which appears within 10 feet and joins Combat at Initiative 1. Your Sprite is a Minion of half your own Level.

The Create gesture scales with Wisdom and the Sprite survives for 6 Rounds. You may only have one active Sprite, casting another spell using the Create gesture replaces your previous Sprite. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 4 Action and 1 Focus.

Playtest Notes

Not all Runes have a Sprite actor defined yet. Runes that do not yet have a defined Creation will — for now — manifest a Flame Sprite.

Rune: Earth.name: Rune: Earth
Rune: Earth.description:
The orderly force of elemental earth, responsible for physical matter. The Earth rune governs minerals, metals, soils, and other physical compounds.

The Earth rune scales using Wisdom, targets Reflex, and deals Acid damage to Health. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Lightning.

Mould.name: Mould
Mould.description:
Your command of the Rune of Earth allows you to manipulate raw forces of rock, mineral, and soil in basic ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Quickly shape up to one cubic foot of available material into a simple geometric form like a cuboid, ellipsoid, or polyhedron.

  • Precisely copy the physical shape of a held object that is smaller than a 6-inch cube, reproducing it from available clay, stone, or metal. The replica retains no useful properties except for its physical form.

  • Separate and collect earthen particles from the surface of an object, creature, or liquid that you touch, rendering the subject completely cleaned or purified in moments.

Mould may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

description.public: A crude yet effective weapon, the club is a blunt length of wood or bone designed to crush rather than cut. It can be a dangerous implement in the hands of even untrained fighters.
Toughened skins from large beasts or monsters, these rugged armors are worn by hunters and wildfolk, offering durable—but crude—defense in the field.

This steel ring feels permanently cool to the touch and gives the sensation of weighing more than expected given its narrow band.

This enchanted ring provides a bonus to Armor defense.
description.private:
This item is presented as an example of a Fine Ring with the @UUID[Compendium.crucible.affixes.ActiveEffect.reinforcement000]{Reinforcement} suffix.

This affix can be applied to any armor or accessory and this ring could be further enchanted with a Tier 1 prefix.

Reinforcement.name: Reinforcement
Reinforcement.description: Increase Armor defense by 1 for each Tier of this suffix.

description.public:
This charm-covered necklace looks rustic, but upon close inspection you notice a delicate craft imbued within its workmanship. While holding it you feel your breaths deepen and the minor aches within your muscles dissipate.

This enchanted charm provides a bonus to Fortitude defense.
description.private:
This item is presented as an example of a Fine Charm with the @UUID[Compendium.crucible.affixes.ActiveEffect.tenacity00000000]{Tenacity} suffix.

This affix can be applied to any armor or accessory and this charm could be further enchanted with a Tier 1 prefix.

Tenacity.name: Tenacity
Tenacity.description: Increase Fortitude defense by 1 per each Tier of this suffix.

description.public: A leather-wrapped bladder that can be affixed to a belt or outside of a pack for convenient use. Can contain 26oz of liquid.

Layered oil-soaked affixed around the end of a rod made of bone or another non-flammable material, an inexpensive, if inefficient, temporary lightsource. Each torch can burned for one hour before it can no longer be used.

Light Torch.name: Light Torch
Light Torch.description: You ignite the @ref[name], producing flickering illumination in a wide radius for one hour. The torch is consumed by this action and cannot be used again, but its light remains until it burns out.

description.public: Dried bread, nuts, smoked cheese and meat suitable to serve as a rudimentary meal capable of sustaining life for a single day.
This potion contains a specialized alchemical formula to rapidly close wounds and improve bodily health.

Healing Elixir.name: Healing Elixir
Healing Elixir.description:
Immediately recover an amount of Health dependant on the quality of the elixir.

  • Shoddy - Immediately heals 6 Health.

  • Standard - Immediately heals 12 Health.

  • Fine - Immediately heals 24 Health.

  • Superior - Immediately heals 48 Health.

  • Masterwork - Immediately heals 96 Health.

Heavy Weapon Training.name: Heavy Weapon Training
Heavy Weapon Training.description: You know how to use a heavy weapon to deliver punishing blows, putting your entire strength behind every swing. You are Trained with all weapons in the Heavy and Balanced categories.

Heavy Strike.name: Heavy Strike
Heavy Strike.description: You unleash a powerful Strike with your mainhand weapon. The attack is slower to execute, but is Empowered to deliver additional damage.

description.public: This talisman, favored by druidic adherants attuned to the power of the land, aids in the practice of spellcraft or can be used in combat to direct a gout of poisonous spores towards an enemy.

ancestry.name: Orcish
ancestry.description: Your birth was marked by the stars and traditions of a proud and enduring people. Your tall and well-toned body and natural propensity for toughness has origins amid a people exposed to the relentless struggle of a harsh northern clime. Your people are known for their strength and resilience above all else.

background.name: Acolyte
background.description: You were a person of faith. You learned how to live selflessly in service to others or in pursuit of a higher ideal.

Ingest Paralytic.name: Ingest Paralytic
Ingest Paralytic.description:
When this toxin is ingested or otherwise enters the bloodstream of a creature, it is initially Harmless, but the target must defend an attack against its Fortitude or become @Condition[paralyzed].

The duration is dependent on the quality of the @ref[name]:

  • Shoddy - 1 rounds

  • Standard - 2 rounds

  • Fine - 4 rounds

  • Superior - 8 rounds

  • Masterwork - Indefinite

This action should be used when the poison is ingested rather than when it is first applied.

Apply Paralytic.name: Apply Paralytic
Apply Paralytic.description:
The contents of this vial can be added to food, drink, smeared upon a bladed weapon, or combined with some alternative delivery mechanism.

This action, which consumes the available usage of the poison, should be used when it is first applied.

Penetrating Shot.name: Penetrating Shot
Penetrating Shot.description: You fire a shot which penetrates through multiple targets in a direct line.

Ingest Poison.name: Ingest Poison
Ingest Poison.description:
When this toxin is ingested or otherwise enters the bloodstream of a creature, it is initially Harmless, but the target must defend an attack against its Fortitude or become @Condition[poisoned].

The amount of poison damage and its duration is dependent on the quality of the @ref[name]:

  • Shoddy - 2 damage for 4 rounds

  • Standard - 4 damage for 6 rounds

  • Fine - 6 damage for 8 rounds

  • Superior - 8 damage for 10 rounds

  • Masterwork - 10 damage for 12 rounds

This action should be used when the poison is ingested rather than when it is first applied.

Apply Poison.name: Apply Poison
Apply Poison.description:
The contents of this vial can be added to food, drink, smeared upon a bladed weapon, or combined with some alternative delivery mechanism.

This action, which consumes the available usage of the poison, should be used when it is first applied.

Precision Shot.name: Precision Shot
Precision Shot.description: You steady your aim and fire a single accurate shot.

Quick Draw.name: Quick Draw
Quick Draw.description: You can loose a shot under pressure, although with decreased accuracy. You perform a Strike that is Difficult, but has a reduced Action cost.

Motivate.name: Motivate
Motivate.description:
Your command of the Rune of Control allows you to affect the decision making of others in basic ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Moderately intensify or dampen the primary emotion being felt by a creature you touch. If the creature is intelligent enough to be aware of the laws governing spellcraft, they are aware of your actions.

  • Understand the abstract motivations of another living creature which allows you to touch it. You are able to intuit their immediate goals expressed in the form of a single verb.

  • Intensely focus on your current objective and the means of achieving it. You receive a brief hint or reminder from the Gamemaster about that objective containing only information which you have previously learned.

Motivate may only affect a creature or object which you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Ennervate.name: Ennervate
Ennervate.description:
Your command of the Rune of Death allows for basic communion with the dead and for rudimentary manipulation of unholy forces, producing one of the following effects:

  • Spread decay over an object no larger than a 1-foot cube, causing plants to wither, metallic objects to rust, wood to become rotten, food to grow foul, or a corpse to rapidly decompose. Magical objects are typically unaffected.

  • Cause a corpse which has been dead for less than seven days or otherwise preserved to perform a lifeless reenactment of its final moments. Its movements imitate those that occurred during the creature's final 30 seconds of life. You have no control over the creature nor can it communicate in any other way.

  • Hasten the death of a willing creature that is currently dying, causing it to pass swiftly and peacefully.

Ennervate may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Mould.name: Mould
Mould.description:
Your command of the Rune of Earth allows you to manipulate raw forces of rock, mineral, and soil in basic ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Quickly shape up to one cubic foot of available material into a simple geometric form like a cuboid, ellipsoid, or polyhedron.

  • Precisely copy the physical shape of a held object that is smaller than a 6-inch cube, reproducing it from available clay, stone, or metal. The replica retains no useful properties except for its physical form.

  • Separate and collect earthen particles from the surface of an object, creature, or liquid that you touch, rendering the subject completely cleaned or purified in moments.

Mould may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Enkindle.name: Enkindle
Enkindle.description:
Your command of the Rune of Flame allows you to manipulate fire and thermal energy in creative ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Manifest a burst of elemental flame in one inch sphere which can ignite a candle, torch, or other flammable materials.

  • Imbue your body with momentary thermal shielding which provides you with immunity to fire damage on an immediately subsequent action that costs 1 Action or less.

  • Control the movement of flames within a small area, causing them to flicker, dance, or shift in an animated performance of light and shadow.

Enkindle may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Seeming.name: Seeming
Seeming.description:
Your command of the Rune of Illusion allows you to fabricate perception in various simple ways and to manipulate shadow and light to create distraction or entertainment, producing one of the following effects:

  • Modify a single aspect of your own physical appearance. Such alterations might include adjusting the sound of your voice, changing the color of your eyes, gaining illusory horns, or appearing slightly taller or shorter. The alteration persists until you Rest or enact a different alteration and can be verified as illusory by physical inspection.

  • Manifest a convincing recreation of a short sound or single scent that you can clearly recall. The illusion originates from your position and lasts for 10 seconds. You can control the volume of the sound or odorousness of the scent to be perceptible up to a range of 60 feet or shorter.

  • Decouple your shadow from your form, specifically controlling its movements separately from your own. You can maintain this illusion as long as you do not perform any other action that consumes Focus.

Seeming may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Propel.name: Propel
Propel.description:
Your command of the Rune of Kinesis allows you to exert local control over gravitational forces to perform basic telekinetic manipulations, producing one of the following effects:

  • Pull an unsecured object within 15 feet and with weight no greater than 1 towards you and catch it. An object that is equipped or possessed by a creature is never treated as unsecured unless that creature is willing to release it.

  • Flick an object that you hold with weight no greater than 1 towards a target up to 30 feet away. The object flies unerringly in a straight line towards that target at a moderate speed. Any creature along the object's path can react to catch it as long as they have a free hand with which to do so.

  • Suspend in midair an object or willing creature that you touch with weight less than or equal to 10 times your Presence, altering its position up to 20 feet in any direction from its original location. You can maintain this suspension indefinitely as long as you take no further Action and are not @Condition[incapacitated].

Propel may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch unless otherwise specified. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Bloom.name: Bloom
Bloom.description:
Your command of the Rune of Life allows you to stimulate biological growth and nourish physical health, producing one of the following effects:

  • Cultivate 1 cubic foot of existing plants or fungus to rapidly grow to a healthy, blossoming, or harvestable state.

  • Identify a negative physical condition that is affecting a creature such as @Condition[diseased], @Condition[poisoned], @Condition[bleeding], or @Condition[weakened].

  • Verify whether a portion of food or drink is free of contamination from bacteria, parasites, or poison.

Bloom may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Energize.name: Energize
Energize.description:
Your command of the Rune of Lightning allows you to conduct the flow of both air and electricity, manipulating charge and aerodynamics to produce one of the following effects:

  • Instill an electromagnetic charge into a metallic object that you touch no larger than a one-foot cube, causing it to strongly adhere to other metals. Only one object can be charged in this way at a given time, casting this spell on a different object causes the prior object to lose its magnetic effect.

  • Gather a squall of wind at your current location in a six-foot radius which blows either as a gust in a single controlled direction or as a cyclone with centripetal force in all directions. Airborne effects in the immediate area are dispersed and unsecured objects with weight less than 1 are flung in the direction of the gust.

  • Produce the concussive sound of a thunderclap at a location you can see within 15 feet of your current position.

Energize may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Erase.name: Erase
Erase.description:
Your command of the Rune of Oblivion allows you to unravel tiny holes in the fabric of existence, producing one of the following effects:

  • Disintegrate a non-magical object you hold smaller than a 6-inch cube, sundering it to a fine particulate dust of its component elements.

  • Anesthetize the ability to feel emotion from yourself or a willing target that you touch, causing it to enter a placid, stoic, or dispassionate state. This effect can be maintained as long as you make no further Action.

  • Subdue the potency of a light source, causing its visible radius to be reduced by half for as long as you maintain physical contact with it. Only one light source may be dampened in this way at a given time.

Erase may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Evoke.name: Evoke
Evoke.description:
Your command of the Rune of Soul allows you to facilitate basic forms of spiritual influence, producing one of the following effects:

  • Enable yourself or another willing person to revisit a core memory of a moment from their past up to one minute in duration as if it happened recently.

  • Identify a negative spiritual condition that is affecting a person such as @Condition[broken], @Condition[frightened], @Condition[confused], or @Condition[insane].

  • Create a momentary spiritual connection with another willing creature that allows them to recognize an idea which can be expressed as a single word.

Uses of Evoke may only affect yourself or another creature which you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Ruthless Momentum.name: Ruthless Momentum
Ruthless Momentum.condition: You incapacitate an enemy with a melee attack.
Ruthless Momentum.description: After defeating an enemy, you may move up to your Stride and attack another foe within melee range.

Read Scroll.name: Read Scroll
Read Scroll.description:
Read this spell scroll, temporarily gaining knowledge of its spellcraft components for 10 minutes.

You may only have one spell scroll effect active at a given time. Reading a different scroll replaces any current effect.

Second Wind.name: Second Wind
Second Wind.description: You focus your energy and recover your Toughness score in Health.

Shield Bash.name: Shield Bash
Shield Bash.description: Following a basic Strike with your mainhand weapon, you Strike with your shield, causing the @Condition[staggered] condition for one Round.

Swipe.name: Swipe
Swipe.description: You perform a Strike against two adjacent enemies, attacking both of them using a single swing of your great weapon.

Refocus.name: Refocus
Refocus.description:
You use your equipped Talisman to attempt to regain some Focus. You perform a Harmless Strike against your own Rallying threshold.

On a success you recover +1 Focus if using a one-handed Talisman and +2 Focus if using a two-handed Talisman. On a critical success the amount of Focus recovered increases by an additional +1.

Thread the Needle.name: Thread the Needle
Thread the Needle.description: You fire a precise shot into melee combat, targeting an enemy which is engaged by one of your allies.

Light Torch.name: Light Torch
Light Torch.description: You ignite the @ref[name], producing flickering illumination in a wide radius for one hour. The torch is consumed by this action and cannot be used again, but its light remains until it burns out.

Twinned Shot.name: Twinned Shot
Twinned Shot.description: You concentrate to nock two projectiles at once making two Strike simultaneous attacks against the same single target.

Grapple.name: Grapple
Grapple.description: You attempt to physically restrain or subdue an opponent. Perform a Athletics skill attack against an adjacent target. If successful, both you and your target are @Condition[restrained] for 1 Round.

Wildspeak.name: Wildspeak
Wildspeak.description:
If you succeed on a [[/skillCheck wilderness 14]] check, you may pose simple questions to a Beast which can perceive you. As long as the creature is not hostile it will respond accurately within the limits of its own knowledge.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score of zero are incapable of understanding you.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score of 1 can only respond with "yes" or "no" responses.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score greater than 1 can provide simple multi-word responses.

Zealous Smite.name: Zealous Smite
Zealous Smite.condition: You are attacking an Exposed enemy with a Heavy weapon.
Zealous Smite.description: You Strike using a Strength-based weapon. The attack becomes Deadly and any damage dealt is Radiant.
